form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 18th of 20 at Ascot October 18 over 1600m, 9 len behind Crown Of Oaks carrying 57.5kg at $15. Previously first up; fifth of 14 at Newbury April 12 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Ebt's Guard with 61kg at $19. Will need this run.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 7th of 13 at Chelmsford on November 27 over 2000m, 7 len behind King's Code with 62kg at $5. First up last campaign 6th of 12 at York on September 7 over 2100m, 2.5 len behind Zain Blue carrying 62kg at $23. Don't dismiss lightly.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation tenth of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather November 3 over 1400m, 10 len behind Chancellor with 59.5kg at $5.50. First up last campaign third of 15 at Goodwood August 1 over 1600m, soft track; 2 len behind Rhoscolyn with 59.5kg at $13. Great chance.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation 15th of 23 at this track September 27 over 1800m, 10 len behind Boiling Point with 53.5kg at $34. Previously first up; third in a small field at Nottingham April 12 over 1680m, 2.75 len behind Secret Theory carrying 57.5kg at $19. Should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Resuming after a eight months break. Not seen since winning won by 1.75 len Curragh August 9 over 1609m defeating Hightimeyouwon with 58kg at $3.50. On debut second of 11 at Leopardstown May 11 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind Zodiac Bear with 61kg at $3.50. A bright start to the prep is anticipated.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 10th of 12 at Wolverhampton on March 7 over 1740m, 10 len behind The Lost King carrying 57kg at $17. Last start 9th of 21 at Doncaster on March 28 over 1600m, 4 len behind Urban Lion with 57kg at $67. Expect he will make amends.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation when last of 11 at this track November 1 over 1600m, 31 len behind Linwood with 62.5kg at $5. First up last campaign sixth of 11 at this track April 17 over 1600m, 8 len behind Bullet Point with 59.5kg at $13. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of 11 weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 16 at Meydan January 30 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind The Fingal Raven with 62kg. Previously first up; eighth of 14 at Meydan January 16 over 1600m, 5 len behind English Oak with 58kg at $11. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up ran last in a small field at Southwell All Weather on March 13 over 1400m, 6 len behind Legal Reform with 61kg at $5.50. Second run from a spell 10th of 22 at Doncaster on March 28 over 1600m, 10 len behind Mezcala carrying 59.5kg at $41. Useful type but must improve sharply.

First up last campaign third of 11 at this track April 17 over 1600m, 3.5 len behind Bullet Point carrying 54kg at $9.50. In the right race and sure to go well.
